overridableConfigKeys.label: Format
overridableConfigKeys.description: Display format: 'number' (locale grouping), 'currency' ($x.xx), 'percent' (rounded %). Unset preserves the value's own decimals.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Prefix
overridableConfigKeys.description: Text to display before the number

overridableConfigKeys.label: Suffix
overridableConfigKeys.description: Text to display after the number

overridableConfigKeys.label: Value
overridableConfigKeys.description: The target value to animate to. Strings are parsed numerically (e.g. '500', '99.9').
